name: Fallen Angel Arlecchino
description:
*and i'm yours / till the earth starts to crumble and the heavens roll away*

Arlecchino as a fallen angel, betrayed and cast out from heaven, maimed and left unable to fly.

Slow burn, immortal x mortal, intersex character. This time, you *can* fix her.
creator: AbsentmindedNihilist
